aesthetic: Modern Japanese Editorial & Fantasy Anime (Ethereal, Premium, Fluid). Inspired by 'Aguas Azules'. Emphasizes deep immersion, distinctive typography, and elegant spacing. Avoid AI-slop; prioritize an organic 'book' feel.

rules: Use 'Spectral' for the Book Title, Chapter headers, and dramatic pull quotes. Apply tracking-tight and leading-none.
Use 'Outfit' for UI elements (menus, buttons, tabs, author name, small metadata).
Use 'Crimson Text' for the actual novel content for optimal long-form readability. Set line-height to leading-relaxed or leading-loose.
CRITICAL: Never use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headers.

home_page.description: Dramatic Book Cover presentation. Large asymmetric title 'IKAI NO SŌSUITAN' over a beautiful ocean illustration. Below the hero section, use a Bento grid for Synopsis, Characters, and Table of Contents. Do NOT use boring standard cards.

reader_view.description: Minimalist, distraction-free reading column. max-w-2xl or max-w-3xl, mx-auto. Generous vertical padding. The UI (header/footer) should be unobtrusive. Include full-bleed anime illustrations strategically placed between chapters.

side_drawer.description: Glassmorphism drawer for Table of Contents, Character Encyclopedia, and Reading Settings (Font size, Theme). Heavy backdrop-blur to maintain immersion.

visual_enhancers.textures: Apply a subtle noise/grain overlay across the app to mimic paper/ink.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use high-blur (backdrop-blur-xl or 2xl) and semi-transparent backgrounds for the header/navigation so it feels premium like milled crystal.
visual_enhancers.illustrations: Full-bleed anime illustrations placed in the story flow, with subtle fade-in animations on scroll.

components.name: Sheet (Drawer)
components.usage: Use shadcn/ui Sheet for the side menu containing ToC, Characters, and Settings.

components.name: Slider
components.usage: Use shadcn/ui Slider for adjusting font size and tracking reading progress.

components.name: Tabs
components.usage: Use shadcn/ui Tabs in the Home page to elegantly switch between 'Synopsis' and 'Characters'.

components.name: Progress
components.usage: Fixed bottom slim progress bar showing current chapter reading completion.

image_urls.description: Seascape under half-moon. Use with a gradient overlay for the main book cover.
Anime girl holding a book. Use in the Characters section.
Dark reflective ocean. Use as a full-width image break between chapters in the reader.

motion.page_transitions: Smooth Framer Motion fade in/out between Cover Home and Reader view.
motion.scroll_animations: Use subtle translateY and opacity fades for paragraphs entering the viewport to make reading feel magical.
motion.ui_hide: Header and progress bar should smoothly fade or translate based on interaction to maximize the reading area.

accessibility: Ensure contrast ratios are met for long-form reading in both themes.
Provide text scaling controls (Font Size Slider) without breaking layout.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='read-button').
instructions_to_main_agent: Build this as a React application using .js/.jsx files (NOT .tsx).

Import fonts via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Crimson+Text:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Spectral:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400&display=swap');
Build a custom HTML/Tailwind cover/home page. DO NOT use generic Shadcn Cards for the book cover.
Implement the reader view using a simple semantic <article> layout with max-w-3xl.
Include a primary 'Leer Novela' (Read Novel) CTA on the Cover that transitions to the Reader View.
Use lucide-react for icons (Menu, Settings, Moon, Sun, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, BookOpen).
In the reader view, add long dummy text in Spanish for Chapter 1 and Chapter 2 to demonstrate scrolling and the progress bar.
Ensure Dark/Light mode toggle is functional and updates Tailwind 'dark' class.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Do not center-align paragraphs in the reader view. Left-align (or justify) for optimal reading flow.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical between chapters and major sections to create breathing room.
Never use generic placeholders; use the provided Unsplash URLs.
Create depth through layered design elements (glassmorphism for nav, solid colors for text).
NEVER use complete transparent background in header, overlays, or any surface that has content under it.
Implement data-testid on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='theme-toggle', data-testid='chapter-link', data-testid='font-increase-btn').
Use crisp edges via semi-transparent borders and nested radii where appropriate.
Avoid the 'AI slop' look by avoiding generic centered layouts and simplistic gradients.
